questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务或工具可以免费提供 Amazon EC2 资源大小调整建议？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool can provide rightsizing recommendations for Amazon EC2 resources at no additional cost?

A.zh: AWS Well-Architected Tool
A.en: AWS Well-Architected Tool

B.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
B.en: Amazon CloudWatch

C.zh: AWS Cost Explorer
C.en: AWS Cost Explorer

D.zh: Amazon S3 analytics
D.en: Amazon S3 analytics

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此工具主要用于评估架构是否符合AWS最佳实践并提供改进建议，但不直接提供EC2资源的权衡建议。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This tool is mainly used to evaluate whether the architecture conforms to AWS best practices and provide improvement suggestions, but it does not directly provide trade-off suggestions for EC2 resources.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：CloudWatch主要用于监控资源的性能和运行状态。虽然它可以间接帮助用户了解资源使用情况，但没有提供具体的权衡建议。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch is mainly used to monitor the performance and operating status of resources. Although it can indirectly help users understand resource usage, it does not provide specific trade-off recommendations.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Cost Explorer可以提供详细的成本分析，并包含EC2资源权衡建议功能，帮助用户优化成本。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cost Explorer can provide detailed cost analysis and include EC2 resource trade-off recommendation functions to help users optimize costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此工具用于分析S3存储使用情况并协助优化存储成本，但与EC2资源无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This tool is used to analyze S3 storage usage and help optimize storage costs, but has nothing to do with EC2 resources.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Cost Explorer可以提供详细的成本分析，并包含EC2资源权衡建议功能，帮助用户优化成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cost Explorer can provide detailed cost analysis and include EC2 resource trade-off recommendation functions to help users optimize costs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司经营一个 PB 级数据仓库来分析其数据。该公司想要一种不需要手动硬件和软件管理的解决方案。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company operates a petabyte-scale data warehouse to analyze its data. The company wants a solution that will not require manual hardware and software management. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)
A.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

B.zh: Amazon Redshift
B.en: Amazon Redshift

C.zh: Amazon Neptune
C.en: Amazon Neptune

D.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
D.en: Amazon ElastiCache

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon DocumentDB 是一种文件数据库服务，主要用于存储和查询 JSON 格式的文件数据。不适合数据仓库场景。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DocumentDB is a document database service mainly used to store and query document data in JSON format. It is not suitable for data warehouse scenarios.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是专门针对数据仓库设计的服务，支持PB级数据分析，并且完全托管，无需人工管理硬件和软件。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service designed specifically for data warehousing, supporting petabyte-scale data analysis, and is fully managed, eliminating the need for manual management of hardware and software.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Neptune 是一种图数据库服务，主要用于存储和查询社交网络关系等图表数据。不适合数据仓库场景。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a graph database service primarily used for storing and querying graph data such as social network relationships. It is not suitable for data warehouse scenarios.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon ElastiCache 是一项内存缓存服务，主要设计用于加速应用程序性能，而不是用于数据仓库场景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an in-memory caching service designed primarily to accelerate application performance rather than for use in data warehousing scenarios.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是专门针对数据仓库设计的服务，支持PB级数据分析，并且完全托管，无需人工管理硬件和软件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service designed specifically for data warehousing, supporting petabyte-scale data analysis, and is fully managed, eliminating the need for manual management of hardware and software.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家图书馆希望根据图书内容自动对电子图书进行分类。图书馆应使用哪种 AWS 服务来满足此要求？
question_text.en: A library wants to automate the classification of electronic books based on the contents of the books. Which AWS service should the library use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: Amazon Redshift
A.en: Amazon Redshift

B.zh: Amazon CloudSearch
B.en: Amazon CloudSearch

C.zh: Amazon Comprehend
C.en: Amazon Comprehend

D.zh: Amazon Aurora
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Redshift 是一项数据仓库服务，主要用于分析结构化数据。它不具备自然语言处理和内部分类的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a data warehouse service primarily used for analyzing structured data. It does not have the function of natural language processing and internal classification.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudSearch 是一项托管搜索服务，用于对文件运行全文搜索。虽然可以索引文档，但不具备自动分类文档内容的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a managed search service used to perform full-text search on documents. Although it can index documents, it does not have the function of automatically classifying document contents.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon Comprehend 是一种自然语言处理服务，可分析文本内容并提取关键字、主题、细节等信息。它可用于自动对文件内容进行分类。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a natural language processing service that can analyze text content and extract key words, topics, details and other information. It can be used to automatically classify document content.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon Aurora 是一种关系数据库服务，主要用于存储和管理结构化数据。它不具备自然语言处理和内部分类的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a relational database service primarily used to store and manage structured data. It does not have the function of natural language processing and internal classification.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon Comprehend 是一种自然语言处理服务，可分析文本内容并提取关键字、主题、细节等信息。它可用于自动对文件内容进行分类。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a natural language processing service that can analyze text content and extract key words, topics, details and other information. It can be used to automatically classify document content.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根据 AWS 责任共担模式，哪一项任务是 AWS 的责任？
question_text.en: Which task is a responsibility of AWS, according to the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 应用程序数据加密
A.en: Encryption of application data

B.zh: 应用程序用户的身份验证
B.en: Authentication of application users

C.zh: 物理网络基础设施的保护
C.en: Protection of physical network infrastructure

D.zh: 防火墙配置
D.en: Configuration of firewalls

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：应用程序数据中的加密错误。根据 AWS 责任共担模式，应用程序数据的加密是客户的责任。客户需要确保其应用数据在传输和静态时是加密且安全的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Encryption error in application data. Under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, encryption of application data is the customer's responsibility. Customers need to ensure that their application data is encrypted and secure during transmission and storage.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：应用程序用户的身份验证错误。使用用户的身份证是客户的责任。客户需要设置和管理用户身份认证机制，例如使用AWS IAM或其他身份认证服务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Authentication error for application user. It is the customer's responsibility to use the user's identity card. Customers need to configure and manage user identity authentication mechanisms, such as using AWS IAM or other identity authentication services.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：物理网络基础设施得到适当保护。根据AWS责任共担模式，AWS 负责保护其整个基础设施的安全，包括管理网络、硬件和数据中心。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The physical network infrastructure is properly protected. According to the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, AWS is responsible for protecting the security of its entire infrastructure, including management networks, hardware, and data centers.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：防火墙配置防火墙配置是客户的责任。客户需要配置安全群组、网络ACL等来保护自己的资产。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Firewall configuration Firewall configuration is the customer's responsibility. Customers need to configure security groups, network ACLs, etc. to protect their assets.

answer_text.zh: C. 物理网络基础设施的保护
answer_text.en: C. Protection of physical network infrastructure

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：物理网络基础设施得到适当保护。根据AWS责任共担模式，AWS 负责保护其整个基础设施的安全，包括管理网络、硬件和数据中心。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The physical network infrastructure is properly protected. According to the AWS Shared Responsibility Model, AWS is responsible for protecting the security of its entire infrastructure, including management networks, hardware, and data centers.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) 云转型之旅建议包含哪些选项？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) cloud transformation journey recommendations? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 设想阶段
A.en: Envision phase

B.zh: 对齐相位
B.en: Align phase

C.zh: 评估阶段
C.en: Assess phase

D.zh: 动员阶段
D.en: Mobilize phase

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：愿景阶段）：愿景阶段是 AWS CAF 云转型之旅的第一步，旨在定义组织的云目标和策略。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Vision Phase): The vision phase is the first step in the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey and is designed to define the organization's cloud goals and strategy.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：调整阶段）：调整阶段是 AWS CAF 云转型之旅的重要组成部分，确保组织的目标与云策略保持一致。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Alignment Phase): The alignment phase is an important part of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey, ensuring that the organization's goals are aligned with the cloud strategy.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：评估阶段）：评估阶段是 AWS CAF 的组成部分，但不是云转型之旅的建议阶段。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Evaluation phase): The assessment phase is an integral part of AWS CAF, but it is not a recommended phase of the cloud transformation journey.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：移动阶段）：移动阶段是云迁移准备的一部分，但不是 AWS CAF 云转型之旅的建议阶段。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Mobilization phase): The mobilization phase is part of cloud migration preparation, but it is not a recommended phase of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：迁移与现代化阶段）：迁移和现代化阶段是云迁移的实际运行阶段，但不是 AWS CAF 云转型之旅的建议阶段。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Migration and Modernization Phase): The migration and modernization phase is the actual execution phase of cloud migration, but it is not the recommended phase of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey.

answer_text.zh: A. 设想阶段；B. 对齐相位
answer_text.en: A. Envision phase; B. Align phase

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AB (74%) AD (26%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：愿景阶段）：愿景阶段是 AWS CAF 云转型之旅的第一步，旨在定义组织的云目标和策略。；调整阶段）：调整阶段是 AWS CAF 云转型之旅的重要组成部分，确保组织的目标与云策略保持一致。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AB (74%) AD (26%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Vision Phase): The vision phase is the first step in the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey and is designed to define the organization's cloud goals and strategy.; Alignment Phase): The alignment phase is an important part of the AWS CAF cloud transformation journey, ensuring that the organization's goals are aligned with the cloud strategy.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要产生 IAM 用户清单。该公司还希望查看与用户关联的各种凭证的状态，例如密码、访问密钥和多重身份验证 (MFA) 设备。哪些 AWS 服务或功能可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to generate a list of IAM users. The company also wants to view the status of various credentials that are associated with the users, such as password, access keys, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) devices. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: IAM credential report
A.en: IAM credential report

B.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
B.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

C.zh: IAM Access Analyzer
C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management Access Analyzer

D.zh: AWS Cost and Usage Report
D.en: AWS Cost and Usage Report

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：IAM 凭证报告是一项产生 CSV 文件的功能，其中列出所有 IAM 用户及其网关凭证状态（例如密码、访问密钥、MFA 设备等）。这是满足问题需求的正确因此符合题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: IAM Credentials Report is a feature that generates a CSV file listing all IAM users and their gateway credential status (e.g. passwords, access keys, MFA devices, etc.). This is the correct option to meet the needs of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS IAM Identity Center（以前称为AWS Single Sign-On）主要用于集中管理用户访问权限和单点入口，不提供产生IAM用户凭证报告的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly known as AWS Single Sign-On) is mainly used to centrally manage user access rights and single point of entry, and does not provide the function of generating IAM user credential reports.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM访问分析器用于分析资源的访问权限，以协助识别资源是否已被外部实体访问。它不涉及产生用户凭证报告。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM Access Analyzer is used to analyze the access permissions of resources and help identify whether resources are accessed by external entities. It does not involve generating user credentials reports.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 成本和使用情况报告用于追踪和分析 AWS 服务的成本和使用情况，与IAM 用户凭证状态无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS Cost and Usage Report is used to track and analyze the cost and usage of AWS services regardless of IAM user credential status.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：IAM 凭证报告是一项产生 CSV 文件的功能，其中列出所有 IAM 用户及其网关凭证状态（例如密码、访问密钥、MFA 设备等）。这是满足问题需求的正确因此符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM Credentials Report is a feature that generates a CSV file listing all IAM users and their gateway credential status (e.g. passwords, access keys, MFA devices, etc.). This is the correct option to meet the needs of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在设计其 AWS 工作负载，以便可以定期更新组件，并以小的、可逆的增量进行更改。此设计支持 AWS Well-Architected Framework的哪一个支柱？
question_text.en: A company is designing its AWS workloads so that components can be updated regularly and so that changes can be made in small, reversible increments. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework does this design support?

A.zh: 安全
A.en: Security

B.zh: 性能效率
B.en: Performance efficiency

C.zh: 卓越运营
C.en: Operational excellence

D.zh: 可靠性
D.en: Reliability

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：安全支柱着重于保护数据、系统和资产，主要涉及访问控制、数据加密等，与问题中所述的「更新组件」和「可逆变更」没有直接关系。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The security pillar focuses on protecting data, systems and assets, mainly involving access control, data encryption, etc., and is not directly related to the "updating components" and "reversible changes" stated in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：性能效率支柱着重于优化资源使用以提高性能。主要涉及选择合适的资源类型和大小，与问题中陈述的设计原则没有直接关系。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The performance efficiency pillar focuses on optimizing resource usage to improve performance. It mainly involves selecting appropriate resource types and sizes and is not directly related to the design principles stated in the question.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：卓越运营支柱强调通过流程的自动化和优化来实现高效的运维管理，并支持小规模、可逆的变更，这与题目中描述的设计原则完全一致。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The operational excellence pillar emphasizes achieving efficient operational management through automation and optimization of processes, and supports small-scale, reversible changes, which is fully consistent with the design principles described in the title.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：可靠性支柱着重于系统的弹性和故障处理能力。虽然与系统设计相关，但主题侧重于「更新组件」和「可逆变更」，这更符合卓越运营的理念。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The reliability pillar focuses on the system's resilience and fault handling capabilities. Although it is related to system design, the topic focuses on "updating components" and "reversible changes", which is more in line with the concept of operational excellence.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：卓越运营支柱强调通过流程的自动化和优化来实现高效的运维管理，并支持小规模、可逆的变更，这与题目中描述的设计原则完全一致。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The operational excellence pillar emphasizes achieving efficient operational management through automation and optimization of processes, and supports small-scale, reversible changes, which is fully consistent with the design principles described in the title.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要追踪其 Amazon S3 对象的标签、存储桶和前缀。哪个 S3 功能可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to track tags, buckets, and prefixes for its Amazon S3 objects. Which S3 feature will meet this requirement?

A.zh: S3 Inventory report
A.en: S3 Inventory report

B.zh: S3 Lifecycle
B.en: S3 Lifecycle

C.zh: S3 Versioning
C.en: S3 Versioning

D.zh: S3 ACLs
D.en: S3 ACLs

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：S3 Inventory 报告是一项功能，可协助用户追踪 S3 存储桶中的对象元数据，包括标签、文件等。这正是问题所需的功能。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The S3 Inventory report is a feature that helps users track object metadata in S3 buckets, including tags, files, etc. This is exactly the function required by the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 生命周期用于定义对象的存储管理规则，例如将对象迁移到低成本存储或删除对象，但不用于追踪目标、存储桶或对象。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The S3 lifecycle is used to define storage management rules for objects, such as migrating objects to low-cost storage or deleting objects, but it is not used to track targets, buckets, or objects.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 Versioning用于管理对象的多个版本，但不提供追踪文件、存储桶或文件的功能。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to manage multiple versions of an object, but it does not provide the ability to track files, buckets, or files.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 访问控制清单 (ACL) 用于管理对对象和存储桶的访问，但不涉及追踪对象、存储桶或存储桶。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Access Control Lists (ACLs) are used to manage access to objects and buckets, but they do not involve tracking objects, buckets, or buckets.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：S3 Inventory 报告是一项功能，可协助用户追踪 S3 存储桶中的对象元数据，包括标签、文件等。这正是问题所需的功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The S3 Inventory report is a feature that helps users track object metadata in S3 buckets, including tags, files, etc. This is exactly the function required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望允许用户使用一组凭证对多个 AWS 账户进行验证和授权。哪种 AWS 服务或资源可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to allow users to authenticate and authorize multiple AWS accounts by using a single set of credentials. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Organizations
A.en: AWS Organizations

B.zh: IAM user
B.en: IAM user

C.zh: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
C.en: AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

D.zh: AWS Control Tower
D.en: AWS Control Tower

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Organizations主要用于管理多个AWS 账户的组织架构和策略，但不直接提供用户身份认证和授权功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to manage the organizational structure and policies of multiple AWS accounts, but it does not directly provide user identity authentication and authorization functions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM user 是针对单一账户的身份认证机制，无法实现跨多个账户的单一身份认证和授权。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an identity authentication mechanism for a single account and cannot implement single identity authentication and authorization across multiple accounts.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项允许用户使用单一验证来访问多个 AWS 账户和应用程序。是解决跨账户认证授权的最佳选择。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option allows users to use a single identity authentication to access multiple AWS accounts and applications. It is the best choice to solve cross-account authentication and authorization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项提供了设置和管理多账户环境的最佳实践，但它不直接提供用户身份验证和授权功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option provides best practices for setting up and managing multi-account environments, but it does not directly provide user authentication and authorization capabilities.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)
answer_text.en: C. AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项允许用户使用单一验证来访问多个 AWS 账户和应用程序。是解决跨账户认证授权的最佳选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option allows users to use a single identity authentication to access multiple AWS accounts and applications. It is the best choice to solve cross-account authentication and authorization.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司创建了一个 Amazon EC2 实例。该公司希望在实例层级控制传入和出站的网络流量。哪些 AWS 资源或服务可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company created an Amazon EC2 instance. The company wants to control the incoming and outgoing network traffic at the instance level. Which AWS resource or service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS Shield
A.en: AWS Shield

B.zh: Security groups
B.en: Security groups

C.zh: 网络访问分析仪
C.en: Network Access Analyzer

D.zh: VPC endpoints
D.en: VPC endpoints

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Shield 是托管分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) 保护服务，用于保护应用程序免受 DDoS 攻击。它不用于控制 EC2 实例的网络流量。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a managed distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) protection service used to protect applications from DDoS attacks. It is not used to control network traffic of EC2 instances.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该选项是用于控制 EC2 实例的入站和出站流量的虚拟防火墙。它是为实例级网络流量控制而设计。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: These choices are a virtual firewall used to control inbound and outbound traffic to EC2 instances. It is specifically designed for instance-level network traffic control.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络访问分析仪是用于分析和优化网络访问权限的工具。它不会直接控制EC2实例的网络流量。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a tool used to analyze and optimize network access rights. It does not directly control the network traffic of EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这些选项用于在 VPC 内私下连接到 AWS 服务，而无需通过 Internet。它不用于控制 EC2 实例的网络流量。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are used to connect to AWS services privately within a VPC without going over the Internet. It is not used to control network traffic of EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该选项是用于控制 EC2 实例的入站和出站流量的虚拟防火墙。它是为实例级网络流量控制而设计。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: These choices are a virtual firewall used to control inbound and outbound traffic to EC2 instances. It is specifically designed for instance-level network traffic control.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用 AWS 云在全球部署应用程序。公司应该采用哪种架构部署模型来满足这个需求？
question_text.en: A company wants to use the AWS Cloud to deploy an application globally. Which architecture deployment model should the company use to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 多区域
A.en: Multi-Region

B.zh: 单一区域
B.en: Single-Region

C.zh: 多可用区
C.en: Multi-AZ

D.zh: 单可用区
D.en: Single-AZ

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：多区域部署模型允许应用程序在多个地理区域运行，满足全球用户的低延迟需求，同时提供更高的可用性和容灾能力。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The multi-region deployment model allows applications to run in multiple geographic regions, meeting the low-latency needs of global users while providing higher availability and disaster tolerance.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：单一区域）：单区域部署仅限于一个地理区域，无法满足全球用户需求，可能会导致较高的延迟和单点故障风险。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Single zone): Single-region deployment is limited to one geographical area and cannot meet global user needs, which may result in higher latency and single point of failure risks.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：多个可用区）：多可用区部署仅提供单一区域内的高可用性，无法扩展到全球以满足全球用户的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Multiple Availability Zones): Multi-AZ deployment only provides high availability within a single region and cannot be extended globally to meet the needs of global users.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：单一可用区）：单一可用区部署风险较高，且仅限于单一区域，无法满足全球应用部署需求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Single Availability Zone): Single availability zone deployment has high risks and is limited to a single region, making it unable to meet global application deployment needs.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：多区域部署模型允许应用程序在多个地理区域运行，满足全球用户的低延迟需求，同时提供更高的可用性和容灾能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The multi-region deployment model allows applications to run in multiple geographic regions, meeting the low-latency needs of global users while providing higher availability and disaster tolerance.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要一个 Web 应用程序与各种 AWS 服务交互。哪种 AWS 服务或资源可以满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants a web application to interact with various AWS services. Which AWS service or resource will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS CloudShell
A.en: AWS CloudShell

B.zh: AWS Marketplace
B.en: AWS Marketplace

C.zh: AWS Management Console
C.en: AWS Management Console

D.zh: AWS CLI
D.en: AWS CLI

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CloudShell 是一个基于浏览器的命令行接口，用于运行 AWS CLI 命令。虽然它可以与 AWS 服务交互，但它主要用于命令行操作，而不是用于构建和管理 Web 应用程序。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a browser-based command line interface for running AWS CLI commands. Although it can interact with AWS services, it is primarily intended for command line operations rather than for building and managing web applications.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是一个用于购买和部署第三方软件解决方案的在线商店。它不直接用于与 AWS 服务交互或创建 Web 应用程序。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is an online store for purchasing and deploying third-party software solutions. It is not used directly to interact with AWS services or build web applications.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 管理控制台是一个基于 Web 的接口，可让用户通过图形接口与 AWS 服务交互。它是管理和创建 Web 应用程序的最佳选择。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The AWS Management Console is a web-based interface that allows users to interact with AWS services through a graphical interface. It is the best option for managing and building web applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CLI 是一个用于与 AWS 服务交互的命令行工具。虽然它功能强大，但并不适合直接用于创建网络应用程序。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The AWS CLI is a command-line tool for interacting with AWS services. Although it is powerful, it is not suitable for direct use in building web applications.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (70%) D (30%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS 管理控制台是一个基于 Web 的接口，可让用户通过图形接口与 AWS 服务交互。它是管理和创建 Web 应用程序的最佳选择。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (70%) D (30%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS Management Console is a web-based interface that allows users to interact with AWS services through a graphical interface. It is the best option for managing and building web applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将其应用程序从本地迁移到 AWS 云。该公司希望确保仅向应用程序分配运行所有操作所需的最低权限。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating its applications from on-premises to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to ensure that the applications are assigned only the minimum permissions that are needed to perform all operations. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
A.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

B.zh: Amazon CloudWatch
B.en: Amazon CloudWatch

C.zh: Amazon Macie
C.en: Amazon Macie

D.zh: Amazon GuardDuty
D.en: Amazon GuardDuty

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：IAM 是 AWS 的核心服务，用于管理用户、群组、角色和权限。支持最小权限原则，通过精细化的权限策略确保资源安全。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: IAM is the core service of AWS and is used to manage users, groups, roles, and permissions. It supports the principle of least privilege and ensures resource security through refined permission policies.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：CloudWatch 是一项用于监控和管理 AWS 资源的服务。主要用于收集、查看日志、指标、设置警报。与权限管理无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch is a service used to monitor and manage AWS resources. It is mainly used to collect and view logs, indicators, and set alarms. It has nothing to do with permission management.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Macie 是一项数据安全服务，用于识别和保护敏感数据（例如 PII），与权限管理没有直接关系。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Macie is a data security service used to identify and protect sensitive data (such as PII) and is not directly related to rights management.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：GuardDuty 是一种威胁检测服务，用于识别潜在的安全威胁，与权限管理没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security threats and is not directly related to rights management.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
answer_text.en: A. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：IAM 是 AWS 的核心服务，用于管理用户、群组、角色和权限。支持最小权限原则，通过精细化的权限策略确保资源安全。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM is the core service of AWS and is used to manage users, groups, roles, and permissions. It supports the principle of least privilege and ensures resource security through refined permission policies.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪些选项是 AWS 云采用架构 (AWS CAF) 治理视角功能？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which options are AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF) governance perspective capabilities? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 身份与访问管理
A.en: Identity and access management

B.zh: 云财务管理
B.en: Cloud financial management

C.zh: 应用程序组合管理
C.en: Application portfolio management

D.zh: 创新管理
D.en: Innovation management

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：身份和访问管理属于 AWS CAF 的安全视角，而非治理视角。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Identity and access management belongs to the Security Perspective of AWS CAF, not the governance perspective.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：取得云财务管理云财务管理是从治理角度来看的重要能力之一，旨在优化云成本并确保财务透明度。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Get cloud financial management Cloud financial management is one of the important capabilities from a governance perspective, aiming to optimize cloud costs and ensure financial transparency.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：应用程序组合管理是治理观点的核心功能之一，涉及管理和优化组织的应用程序组合。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Application portfolio management is one of the core capabilities of the governance perspective and involves managing and optimizing an organization's application portfolio.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：创新管理属于AWS CAF的创新视角，而非治理视角。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Innovation management belongs to the Innovation Perspective of AWS CAF, not the governance perspective.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：产品管理通常与运维或交付相关，属于治理观点以外的其他观点。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Product management is usually related to operations or delivery and belongs to other perspectives than the governance perspective.

answer_text.zh: B. 云财务管理；C. 应用程序组合管理
answer_text.en: B. Cloud financial management; C. Application portfolio management

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BC (82%) AB (18%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：取得云财务管理云财务管理是从治理角度来看的重要能力之一，旨在优化云成本并确保财务透明度。；应用程序组合管理是治理观点的核心功能之一，涉及管理和优化组织的应用程序组合。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (82%) AB (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Get cloud financial management Cloud financial management is one of the important capabilities from a governance perspective, aiming to optimize cloud costs and ensure financial transparency.; Application portfolio management is one of the core capabilities of the governance perspective and involves managing and optimizing an organization's application portfolio.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪种 AWS 服务提供单一位置来追踪应用程序迁移的进度？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations?

A.zh: AWS Application Discovery Service
A.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

B.zh: AWS Application Migration Service
B.en: AWS Application Migration Service

C.zh: AWS Service Catalog
C.en: AWS Service Catalog

D.zh: AWS Migration Hub
D.en: AWS Migration Hub

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Application Discovery Service用于收集有关本地数据中心中的服务器、应用程序和依赖项的信息，以协助规划迁移。它不提供追踪迁移进度的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to collect information about servers, applications, and dependencies in an on-premises data center to help plan migrations. It does not provide functionality to track migration progress.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Application Migration Service用于将本地服务器迁移到 AWS，但其主要功能是运行迁移，而不是提供单一位置来追踪迁移进度。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to migrate on-premises servers to AWS, but its primary function is to perform the migration, not to provide a single location to track migration progress.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Service Catalog用于管理和部署预先定义的云资源集合。它与应用程序迁移无关，也不提供迁移进度追踪。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to manage and deploy a predefined collection of cloud resources. It has nothing to do with application migration and does not provide migration progress tracking.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务提供了一个位置来追踪应用程序迁移的进度并支持多种迁移工具，是正确的答案。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service, which provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations and supports multiple migration tools, is the right answer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务提供了一个位置来追踪应用程序迁移的进度并支持多种迁移工具，是正确的答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service, which provides a single location to track the progress of application migrations and supports multiple migration tools, is the right answer.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用最新的 Amazon Linux 2 Amazon 系统映像 (AMI) 启动了 Amazon EC2 实例。系统管理员可以采取哪些操作来连接到 EC2 实例？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: A company launched an Amazon EC2 instance with the latest Amazon Linux 2 Amazon Machine Image (AMI). Which actions can a system administrator take to connect to the EC2 instance? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect。
A.en: Use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect.

B.zh: 使用远程桌面协议 (RDP) 连接。
B.en: Use a Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Batch。
C.en: Use AWS Batch.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 会话管理器。
D.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect：Amazon EC2 Instance Connect 是一个基于浏览器的工具，用于通过 SSH 连接到 Amazon Linux 2 或 Ubuntu 实例。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect: Amazon EC2 Instance Connect is a browser-based tool for connecting to Amazon Linux 2 or Ubuntu instances via SSH.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项使用远程桌面协议 (RDP) 连接：RDP 是用于连接至 Windows 实例的协议，且问题明确提到使用 Amazon Linux 2 AMI，因此它不适用。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option use a Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection: RDP is a protocol used to connect to Windows instances, and the question clearly mentions that Amazon Linux 2 AMI is used, so it does not apply.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项使用 AWS Batch：AWS Batch 是一项用于运行批量作业的服务，与连接到 EC2 实例无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option use AWS Batch: AWS Batch is a service for running batch jobs and has nothing to do with connecting to EC2 instances.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项使用 AWS Systems Manager 会话管理器：会话管理器允许通过 AWS 控制台或 CLI 安全连接到 EC2 实例，无需 SSH 密钥或开放连接端口。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager: Session Manager allows secure connection to EC2 instances via the AWS console or CLI, without the need for SSH keys or open ports.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项使用 Amazon Connect：Amazon Connect 是一项云联系中心服务，与连接至 EC2 实例无关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option use Amazon Connect: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service and has nothing to do with connecting to EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect。；D. 使用 AWS Systems Manager 会话管理器。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect.; D. Use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项使用 Amazon EC2 Instance Connect：Amazon EC2 Instance Connect 是一个基于浏览器的工具，用于通过 SSH 连接到 Amazon Linux 2 或 Ubuntu 实例。；此选项使用 AWS Systems Manager 会话管理器：会话管理器允许通过 AWS 控制台或 CLI 安全连接到 EC2 实例，无需 SSH 密钥或开放连接端口。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option use Amazon EC2 Instance Connect: Amazon EC2 Instance Connect is a browser-based tool for connecting to Amazon Linux 2 or Ubuntu instances via SSH.; This option use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager: Session Manager allows secure connection to EC2 instances via the AWS console or CLI, without the need for SSH keys or open ports.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪个架构概念描述了按需部署资源并在不再需要时释放资源的能力？
question_text.en: Which architecture concept describes the ability to deploy resources on demand and release resources when they are no longer needed?

A.zh: 高可用性
A.en: High availability

B.zh: 解耦架构
B.en: Decoupled architecture

C.zh: 弹性
C.en: Resilience

D.zh: 弹性
D.en: Elasticity

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：指系统在故障或高负载情况下仍能正常运行的能力。虽然与资产管理相关，但并不直接描述按需部署和释放资产的能力。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the ability of a system to operate normally despite failures or high load conditions. Although related to asset management, it does not directly describe the ability to deploy and release assets on demand.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：解耦架构 是指通过减少组件之间的依赖关系来提高系统的一致性和可维护性。解耦架构虽然可以间接支持弹性，但并没有直接描述资产的按需部署和释放。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to improving the consistency and maintainability of the system by reducing dependencies between components. Although the decoupled architecture can indirectly support elasticity, it does not directly describe the on-demand deployment and release of assets.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：指系统在遇到故障或中断时恢复并继续运行的能力。它与系统的稳定性和恢复能力有关，但不直接描述资产的动态调整能力。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: refers to the ability of a system to recover and continue operating in the face of failure or disruption. It is related to the stability and recovery ability of the system, but does not directly describe the dynamic adjustment ability of assets.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：弹性伸缩：弹性伸缩是指根据需求动态调整资源的能力，包括按需部署资源和不需要时释放资源。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Elastic scalability: Elastic scalability describes the ability to dynamically adjust resources according to demand, including deploying resources on demand and releasing resources when they are not needed.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：弹性伸缩：弹性伸缩是指根据需求动态调整资源的能力，包括按需部署资源和不需要时释放资源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Elastic scalability: Elastic scalability describes the ability to dynamically adjust resources according to demand, including deploying resources on demand and releasing resources when they are not needed.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪个任务需要用户以 AWS 账户根用户身份登录？
question_text.en: Which task requires a user to sign in as the AWS account root user?

A.zh: 删除 IAM 用户
A.en: The deletion of IAM users

B.zh: 删除 AWS 账户
B.en: The deletion of an AWS account

C.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中创建组织
C.en: The creation of an organization in AWS Organizations

D.zh: Amazon EC2 实例的删除
D.en: The deletion of Amazon EC2 instances

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：删除 IAM 用户删除 IAM 用户不需要 root 用户权限；具有适当权限的 IAM 用户可以完成此任务。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Delete IAM user Deleting an IAM user does not require root user permissions; an IAM user with appropriate permissions can accomplish this task.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：删除 AWS 帐号删除 AWS 帐号是一项敏感操作，只有 root 用户可以运行此任务。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Deleting AWS account is Deleting an AWS account is a sensitive operation and only the root user can perform this task.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在 AWS Organizations 中创建组织。创建 AWS Organizations 组织不需要 root 用户权限；具有适当权限的 IAM 用户可以完成此任务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: creating organization in AWS Organizations. Root user permissions are not required to create an AWS Organizations organization; an IAM user with appropriate permissions can accomplish this task.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：删除 Amazon EC2 实例删除 EC2 实例不需要 root 用户权限；具有适当权限的 IAM 用户可以完成此任务。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Deletion of Amazon EC2 instance Deleting an EC2 instance does not require root user permissions; an IAM user with appropriate permissions can accomplish this task.

answer_text.zh: B. 删除 AWS 账户
answer_text.en: B. The deletion of an AWS account

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (86%) 14%。热门讨论与考点摘要：删除 AWS 帐号删除 AWS 帐号是一项敏感操作，只有 root 用户可以运行此任务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (86%) 14%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Deleting AWS account is Deleting an AWS account is a sensitive operation and only the root user can perform this task.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: Amazon S3 智能分层存储类别提供什么？
question_text.en: What does the Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class offer?

A.zh: 通过预留存储容量实现付款弹性
A.en: Payment flexibility by reserving storage capacity

B.zh: 通过将数据复制到加密的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷来长期保留数据
B.en: Long-term retention of data by copying the data to an encrypted Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume

C.zh: 根据访问模式的变化在层之间移动对象，自动节省成本
C.en: Automatic cost savings by moving objects between tiers based on access pattern changes

D.zh: 安全、持久且成本最低的数据归档存储
D.en: Secure, durable, and lowest cost storage for data archival

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 智能分层的核心功能是根据访问模式自动优化存储成本，而不是通过保留存储容量来支付性能费用。预留存储容量是 Amazon EC2 或 RDS 等其他服务的功能，与 S3 智能分层无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The core functionality of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to automatically optimize storage costs based on access patterns, rather than paying for performance by reserving storage capacity. Reserved storage capacity is a feature of other services such as Amazon EC2 or RDS and has nothing to do with S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3 智能分层不会将数据复制到 Amazon EBS 卷。 EBS 是块存储服务，与S3的对象存储功能不同。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Intelligent-Tiering does not copy data to Amazon EBS volumes. EBS is a block storage service, which is different from the object storage function of S3.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：S3智能分层的主要功能是根据对象访问模式的变化自动在不同存储层之间移动数据，从而优化存储成本。此选项准确地描述了 S3 智能分层的核心。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The main function of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to automatically move data between different storage tiers according to changes in access patterns of objects, thereby optimizing storage costs. This option accurately describes the core of S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项描述 Amazon S3 Glacier 或 S3 Glacier Deep Archive 的功能，而非 S3 智能分层的功能。 S3 智能分层的目标是优化存储成本，而不是专门用于数据迁移。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option describes the functionality of Amazon S3 Glacier or S3 Glacier Deep Archive, not S3 Intelligent-Tiering. The goal of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to optimize storage costs, not specifically for data relocation.

answer_text.zh: C. 根据访问模式的变化在层之间移动对象，自动节省成本
answer_text.en: C. Automatic cost savings by moving objects between tiers based on access pattern changes

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：S3智能分层的主要功能是根据对象访问模式的变化自动在不同存储层之间移动数据，从而优化存储成本。此选项准确地描述了 S3 智能分层的核心。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main function of S3 Intelligent-Tiering is to automatically move data between different storage tiers according to changes in access patterns of objects, thereby optimizing storage costs. This option accurately describes the core of S3 Intelligent-Tiering.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 公司需要 Amazon EC2 实例来实现可以容忍中断的工作负载。哪种 EC2 实例购买选项满足此要求，且与按需价格相比折扣最大？
question_text.en: A company needs Amazon EC2 instances for a workload that can tolerate interruptions. Which EC2 instance purchasing option meets this requirement with the LARGEST discount compared to On-Demand prices?

A.zh: 竞价型实例
A.en: Spot Instances

B.zh: 可转换预留实例
B.en: Convertible Reserved Instances

C.zh: 标准预留实例
C.en: Standard Reserved Instances

D.zh: Dedicated Hosts
D.en: Dedicated Hosts

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是 AWS 提供的购买选项，可让用户以大幅折扣运行 EC2 实例。这些实例可以随时中断，因此适合可容忍中断的工作负载。与按需价格相比，现货实例通常提供最大的折扣。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a purchasing option provided by AWS that allows users to run EC2 instances at a significant discount. These instances can be interrupted at any time, making them suitable for workloads that can tolerate interruptions. Spot Instances usually offer the biggest discounts compared to On-Demand prices.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项可让用户在预留期间内变更实例类型，但折扣通常没有 竞价型实例那么高，且不适用于可容忍中断的工作负载。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option allows users to change instance types during the reservation period, but the discount is generally not as high as Spot Instances and is not available for workloads that can tolerate interruptions.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项提供更高的折扣，但它们是为长期稳定的工作负载而设计的，不适合可以容忍中断的场景。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option offer higher discounts, but they are designed for long-term stable workloads and are not suitable for scenarios that can tolerate interruptions.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项以更高的价格提供对物理服务器的独占访问，适合满足合规性或许可要求的工作负载，且没有大幅折扣。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option provide exclusive access to physical servers at a higher price, suitable for workloads that meet compliance or licensing requirements, without significant discounts.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是 AWS 提供的购买选项，可让用户以大幅折扣运行 EC2 实例。这些实例可以随时中断，因此适合可容忍中断的工作负载。与按需价格相比，现货实例通常提供最大的折扣。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a purchasing option provided by AWS that allows users to run EC2 instances at a significant discount. These instances can be interrupted at any time, making them suitable for workloads that can tolerate interruptions. Spot Instances usually offer the biggest discounts compared to On-Demand prices.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正计划迁移到 AWS 云。该公司希望确定可衡量的业务成果，以解释公司迁移决定的价值。云转型之旅的哪个阶段包括这些活动？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company wants to identify measurable business outcomes that will explain the value of the company's decision to migrate. Which phase of the cloud transformation journey includes these activities?

A.zh: 设想
A.en: Envision

B.zh: 对齐
B.en: Align

C.zh: 规模
C.en: Scale

D.zh: 启动
D.en: Launch

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：构想阶段是云迁移的第一阶段，重点在于定义业务目标、确定可衡量的业务成果，并为迁移提供清晰的价值声明。这完全符合问题中所述的「识别可衡量的业务成果」。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Envision phase is the first phase of cloud migration, focusing on defining business goals, identifying measurable business results, and providing a clear value statement for the migration. This perfectly matches the "identifying measurable business results" stated in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Align阶段主要专注于技术和团队准备，包括团队培训和技术架构调整，而不是识别业务结果。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Align phase mainly focuses on technology and group preparations, including team training and adjustment of technical architecture, rather than identifying business results.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：扩展阶段是扩展和优化云使用的迁移后阶段，与识别业务成果无关。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Scale phase is the post-migration phase of scaling and optimizing cloud usage and has nothing to do with identifying business outcomes.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Launch阶段是云实际迁移并开始运行的阶段。它与问题中所述的「识别业务成果」无关。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Launch stage is the stage where the cloud is actually migrated and started running. It is not related to the "identifying business results" stated in the question.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (93%) 7%。热门讨论与考点摘要：构想阶段是云迁移的第一阶段，重点在于定义业务目标、确定可衡量的业务成果，并为迁移提供清晰的价值声明。这完全符合问题中所述的「识别可衡量的业务成果」。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (93%) 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The Envision phase is the first phase of cloud migration, focusing on defining business goals, identifying measurable business results, and providing a clear value statement for the migration. This perfectly matches the "identifying measurable business results" stated in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一种 AWS 服务或组件允许来自 Internet 的入站流量访问 VPC？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or component allows inbound traffic from the internet to access a VPC?

A.zh: 互联网网关
A.en: Internet gateway

B.zh: NAT gateway
B.en: NAT gateway

C.zh: AWS WAF
C.en: AWS WAF

D.zh: VPC peering
D.en: VPC peering

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是一个 VPC 组件，允许 VPC 中的资源和 Internet 之间的双向通信。它是实现互联网访问的关键组件。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a VPC component that allows two-way communication between resources in the VPC and the Internet. It is a key component that enables Internet access.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：NAT gateway用于允许私有子网中的资源访问Internet，但不允许Internet直接访问这些资源。它是单向的，仅用于出站流量。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to allow resources in a private subnet to access the Internet, but does not allow the Internet to directly access these resources. It is one-way and is used for outbound traffic only.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是 Web 应用程序防火墙，可保护 Web 应用程序免受外部流量攻击，但不负责处理对 VPC 的 Internet 访问。分配。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a web application firewall that protects web applications from external traffic attacks, but is not responsible for handling Internet access to the VPC. Distribution.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：VPC peering用于连接两个VPC以实现私网通信，但不涉及互联网流量的处理。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used to connect two VPCs to achieve private network communication, but it does not involve the processing of Internet traffic.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (95%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是一个 VPC 组件，允许 VPC 中的资源和 Internet 之间的双向通信。它是实现互联网访问的关键组件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a VPC component that allows two-way communication between resources in the VPC and the Internet. It is a key component that enables Internet access.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司可以使用哪种 AWS 服务通过代码创建基础设施？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can companies use to create infrastructure from code?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)

B.zh: AWS Outposts
B.en: AWS Outposts

C.zh: AWS CodePipeline
C.en: AWS CodePipeline

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon EKS 是一项托管 Kubernetes 服务，用于运行容器化应用程序，而不是用于创建基础设施代码。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service for running containerized applications, not for creating infrastructure code.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Outposts 是将 AWS 服务扩展到本地数据中心的解决方案，与基础设施即代码无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a solution for extending AWS services to local data centers, agnostic of infrastructure as code.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS CodePipeline 是一项持续交付服务，用于自动化代码部署流程，但不用于创建基础设施代码。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a continuous delivery service that is used to automate the code deployment process, but it is not used to create infrastructure code.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS CloudFormation可让用户通过模板定义和创建 AWS 资源，从而实现基础设施即代码功能。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service that allows users to define and create AWS resources through templates, enabling infrastructure as code functionality.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS CloudFormation可让用户通过模板定义和创建 AWS 资源，从而实现基础设施即代码功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service that allows users to define and create AWS resources through templates, enabling infrastructure as code functionality.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 哪一条指南是建构云应用程序的架构良好的设计原则？
question_text.en: Which guideline is a well-architected design principle for building cloud applications?

A.zh: 让静态数据更接近计算资源。
A.en: Keep static data closer to compute resources.

B.zh: 为峰值容量提供资源。
B.en: Provision resources for peak capacity.

C.zh: 故障自动恢复设计。
C.en: Design for automated recovery from failure.

D.zh: 使用紧密耦合的组件。
D.en: Use tightly coupled components.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然将数据放置在更靠近计算资源的位置可以提高性能，但这并不是 AWS Well-Architected Framework的核心设计原则之一。此选项更注重性能优化而不是故障恢复。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While placing data closer to computing resources can improve performance, it is not one of the core design principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework. This option is more focused on performance optimization than failure recovery.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：为尖峰容量配置资源可能会导致资源浪费，不符合云计算的弹性原则。 AWS 建议使用按需扩展来优化成本和资源利用率。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Provisioning resources for peak capacity may lead to resource waste and is not in line with the elasticity principle of cloud computing. AWS recommends using on-demand scaling to optimize costs and resource utilization.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：设计从故障中自动恢复是AWS Well-Architected Framework的核心原则之一，它强调高可用性和弹性设计，以确保故障发生时能够自动恢复。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Designing to automatically recover from failures is one of the core principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which emphasizes high availability and elastic design to ensure that failures can automatically recover when failures occur.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 建议使用松散耦合的组件设计来提高灵活性和可扩展性。紧密耦合的组件可能会导致单点故障的风险增加。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS recommends the use of loosely coupled groupware design to improve flexibility and scalability. Tightly coupled groupware can lead to an increased risk of single points of failure.

answer_text.zh: C. 故障自动恢复设计。
answer_text.en: C. Design for automated recovery from failure.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：设计从故障中自动恢复是AWS Well-Architected Framework的核心原则之一，它强调高可用性和弹性设计，以确保故障发生时能够自动恢复。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Designing to automatically recover from failures is one of the core principles of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which emphasizes high availability and elastic design to ensure that failures can automatically recover when failures occur.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要将 75 PB 的数据从其本地数据中心移至 AWS。公司应使用哪种 AWS 服务来最经济高效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to move 75 petabytes of data from its on-premises data centers to AWS. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized
A.en: AWS Snowball Edge Storage Optimized

B.zh: AWS Snowmobile
B.en: AWS Snowmobile

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: AWS Storage Gateway
D.en: AWS Storage Gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务用于中型数据迁移（通常为 TB 等级），但对于 75 PB 的数据量，使用 Snowball Edge 将需要大量设备，效率和成本远不如 AWS Snowmobile。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is used for medium-sized data migration (often at the TB level), but for a data volume of 75 PB, using Snowball Edge will require a large number of devices, and the efficiency and cost are far inferior to AWS Snowmobile.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该服务是针对大规模（PB级）数据迁移而设计的服务。它通过物理卡车传输数据，可以以高效且成本优化的方式移动 75 PB 的数据。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a service designed for large-scale data migration (PB level). It transports data via physical trucks and can move 75 petabytes of data in an efficient and cost-optimized manner.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一种网络连接服务，用于连续数据传输或较小规模的数据迁移。对于 75 PB 的数据，Direct Connect 的传输速度和成本都远非理想。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a network connection service used for continuous data transfer or smaller-scale data migration. For 75 PB of data, Direct Connect's transfer speed and cost are far from ideal.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Storage Gateway主要用于混合云存储解决方案，协助企业将本地数据与AWS云存储进行传输。不适合大规模数据迁移场景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used for hybrid cloud storage solutions to help enterprises transfer local data with AWS cloud storage. It is not suitable for large-scale data migration scenarios.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (80%) A (20%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该服务是针对大规模（PB级）数据迁移而设计的服务。它通过物理卡车传输数据，可以以高效且成本优化的方式移动 75 PB 的数据。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (80%) A (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a service designed for large-scale data migration (PB level). It transports data via physical trucks and can move 75 petabytes of data in an efficient and cost-optimized manner.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 下列哪一个是 AWS Well-Architected Framework的支柱？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 资源可可扩展性
A.en: Resource scalability

B.zh: 性能效率
B.en: Performance efficiency

C.zh: 系统弹性
C.en: System elasticity

D.zh: 敏捷开发
D.en: Agile development

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：资源可扩展性是AWS架构设计中的重要概念，但它并不是AWS架构完善框架的五个支柱之一。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Resource scalability is an important concept in AWS architectural design, but it is not one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：性能效率是 AWS Well-Architected Framework的五个支柱之一，旨在优化资源使用以获得最佳性能。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Performance efficiency is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which aims to optimize resource usage for optimal performance.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：系统弹性：系统弹性是一个与可靠性相关的概念，但它并未单独列为 AWS Well-Architected Framework的支柱。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: System Resilience: System resiliency is a concept related to reliability, but it is not separately listed as a pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：敏捷开发是一种软件开发方法，与 AWS Well-Architected Framework没有直接关系。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Agile development is a software development methodology and is not directly related to the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：卓越运营是 AWS Well-Architected Framework的五个支柱之一，专注于运行和监控系统，以持续改善流程并支持业务目标。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option is described as follows: Operational excellence, one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, focuses on running and monitoring systems to continuously improve processes and support business goals.

answer_text.zh: B. 性能效率；E. 卓越运营
answer_text.en: B. Performance efficiency; E. Operational excellence

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：性能效率是 AWS Well-Architected Framework的五个支柱之一，旨在优化资源使用以获得最佳性能。；卓越运营是 AWS Well-Architected Framework的五个支柱之一，专注于运行和监控系统，以持续改善流程并支持业务目标。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance efficiency is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, which aims to optimize resource usage for optimal performance.; Operational excellence, one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, focuses on running and monitoring systems to continuously improve processes and support business goals.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要将其本地数据中心连接到 AWS 云。该公司需要具有一致网络性能的专用、低延迟连接。哪种 AWS 服务可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to connect its on-premises data center to the AWS Cloud. The company needs a dedicated, low-latency connection with consistent network performance. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Global Accelerator
A.en: AWS Global Accelerator

B.zh: Amazon CloudFront
B.en: Amazon CloudFront

C.zh: AWS Direct Connect
C.en: AWS Direct Connect

D.zh: AWS Managed VPN
D.en: AWS Managed VPN

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务主要用于通过将流量路由到最近的 AWS 区域来优化全球用户访问的应用程序的性能。它不提供与本地数据中心的专用低延迟连接。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is mainly used to optimize the performance of applications accessed by global users by routing traffic to the nearest AWS region. It does not provide a dedicated low-latency connection to an on-premises data center.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon CloudFront 是一项内容交付网络 (CDN) 服务，用于加速静态和动态内容的交付。它不涉及到本地数据中心的专用连接或低延迟连接。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a content delivery network (CDN) service used to accelerate the delivery of static and dynamic content. It doesn't involve dedicated connections or low-latency connections to on-premises data centers.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项提供具有低延迟和一致网络性能的专用网络连接，非常适合将本地数据中心连接到 AWS 云环境。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option provides a dedicated network connection with low latency and consistent network performance, ideal for connecting on-premises data centers to AWS cloud environments.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：此选项提供基于 Internet 的加密连接。虽然它可以将本地数据中心连接到AWS，但其性能和延迟取决于公共互联网，并且不如AWS Direct Connect那么一致。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This option provides an encrypted connection based on the Internet. Although it can connect local data centers to AWS, its performance and latency depend on the public Internet and are not as consistent as AWS Direct Connect.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项提供具有低延迟和一致网络性能的专用网络连接，非常适合将本地数据中心连接到 AWS 云环境。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option provides a dedicated network connection with low latency and consistent network performance, ideal for connecting on-premises data centers to AWS cloud environments.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 公司应将哪些设计原则应用于 AWS 云工作负载，以最大限度地提高持久性并最大限度地减少对环境的影响？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: Which design principles should a company apply to AWS Cloud workloads to maximize sustainability and minimize environmental impact? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 最大限度地利用 Amazon EC2 实例。
A.en: Maximize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.

B.zh: 最大限度地减少 Amazon EC2 实例的使用率。
B.en: Minimize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.

C.zh: 尽量减少托管服务的使用。
C.en: Minimize usage of managed services.

D.zh: 强制用户经常重新安装应用程序。
D.en: Force frequent application reinstallations by users.

E.zh: 减少用户重新安装应用程序的需要。
E.en: Reduce the need for users to reinstall applications.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：最大限度地利用EC2实例可以减少闲置资源的浪费，从而降低能耗，提高资源效率。这是 AWS 永续设计的核心原则之一。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Maximizing the utilization of EC2 instances can reduce the waste of idle resources, thereby reducing energy consumption and improving resource efficiency. This is one of the core principles of sustainable design at AWS.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：尽量减少EC2实例的使用可能会导致资源闲置和能源浪费，这违反了可持续性的原则。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Minimizing the utilization of EC2 instances may lead to idle resources and waste of energy, which is contrary to the principle of sustainability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：托管服务通常经过优化，可以更有效地利用资源并减少对环境的影响。减少托管服务的使用会增加资源浪费。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Hosting services are often optimized to use resources more efficiently and reduce environmental impact. Reducing the use of hosting services increases resource waste.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：频繁地重新安装应用程序会增加用户的计算资源使用和能源消耗，这与可持续性目标不符。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Frequent reinstallation of applications increases users' computing resource usage and energy consumption, which is inconsistent with sustainability goals.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：减少用户重新安装应用程序的需求可以减少计算资源的使用，从而降低能耗，符合永续设计原则。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Reducing the need for users to reinstall applications can reduce the use of computing resources and thus reduce energy consumption, consistent with sustainable design principles.

answer_text.zh: A. 最大限度地利用 Amazon EC2 实例。；E. 减少用户重新安装应用程序的需要。
answer_text.en: A. Maximize utilization of Amazon EC2 instances.; E. Reduce the need for users to reinstall applications.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AE (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：最大限度地利用EC2实例可以减少闲置资源的浪费，从而降低能耗，提高资源效率。这是 AWS 永续设计的核心原则之一。；减少用户重新安装应用程序的需求可以减少计算资源的使用，从而降低能耗，符合永续设计原则。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Maximizing the utilization of EC2 instances can reduce the waste of idle resources, thereby reducing energy consumption and improving resource efficiency. This is one of the core principles of sustainable design at AWS.; Reducing the need for users to reinstall applications can reduce the use of computing resources and thus reduce energy consumption, consistent with sustainable design principles.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS 云在哪些方面提供比本地数据中心更低的计算资源总拥有成本 (TCO)？ （选两个。）
question_text.en: In which ways does the AWS Cloud offer lower total cost of ownership (TCO) of computing resources than on-premises data centers? (Choose two.)

A.zh: AWS 以即用即付成本取代了前期资本支出。
A.en: AWS replaces upfront capital expenditures with pay-as-you-go costs.

B.zh: AWS 专为高可用性而设计，可消除用户停机时间。
B.en: AWS is designed for high availability, which eliminates user downtime.

C.zh: AWS 消除了对本地 IT 人员的需求。
C.en: AWS eliminates the need for on-premises IT staff.

D.zh: AWS 利用规模经济不断降低价格。
D.en: AWS uses economies of scale to continually reduce prices.

E.zh: AWS 为 Amazon EC2 实例提供单一定价模型。
E.en: AWS offers a single pricing model for Amazon EC2 instances.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：此选项不符合问题所需的 AWS 功能或责任范围。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option does not meet the AWS capabilities or scope of responsibility required by the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS确实是为了高可用性而设计的，但高可用性与降低TCO并没有直接关系。高可用性更多的是关于服务可靠性而不是成本优化。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS is indeed designed for high availability, high availability is not directly related to reducing TCO. High availability is more about service reliability than cost optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然使用 AWS 可以减少对本地 IT 人员的需求，但仍需要云架构师、开发人员和其他人员来管理和优化云资产。这并不是直接降低TCO的主要因素。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although using AWS can reduce the need for local IT staff, cloud architects, developers, and others are still needed to manage and optimize cloud assets. This is not the main factor directly reducing TCO.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS 通过规模经济降低运维成本，并将这些节省的成本惠及客户。这是AWS降低TCO的核心优势之一。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS reduces operating costs through economies of scale and passes these savings on to customers. This is one of the core advantages of AWS to reduce TCO.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS 为 Amazon EC2 实例提供多种定价模型（例如按需型实例、预留实例、竞价型实例等），而非单一定价模型。这种一致性是AWS的优势，但它与降低TCO没有直接关系。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS provides multiple pricing models (such as on-demand, reserved instances, Spot instances, etc.) for Amazon EC2 instances instead of a single pricing model. This consistency is an advantage of AWS, but it is not directly related to reducing TCO.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 以即用即付成本取代了前期资本支出。；D. AWS 利用规模经济不断降低价格。
answer_text.en: A. AWS replaces upfront capital expenditures with pay-as-you-go costs.; D. AWS uses economies of scale to continually reduce prices.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：AD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：此选项不符合问题所需的 AWS 功能或责任范围。；AWS 通过规模经济降低运维成本，并将这些节省的成本惠及客户。这是AWS降低TCO的核心优势之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option does not meet the AWS capabilities or scope of responsibility required by the question.; AWS reduces operating costs through economies of scale and passes these savings on to customers. This is one of the core advantages of AWS to reduce TCO.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望将部分资源部署在 AWS 云。为了满足监管要求，数据必须保留在本地。 AWS 和公司资源之间必须具有低延迟。哪些 AWS 服务或功能可用于满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy some of its resources in the AWS Cloud. To meet regulatory requirements, the data must remain local and on premises. There must be low latency between AWS and the company resources. Which AWS service or feature can be used to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS Local Zones
A.en: AWS Local Zones

B.zh: 可用区
B.en: Availability Zones

C.zh: AWS Outposts
C.en: AWS Outposts

D.zh: AWS Wavelength Zones
D.en: AWS Wavelength Zones

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是 AWS 提供的一项服务，允许用户在特定地理位置运行低延迟应用程序。虽然它可以提供低延迟，但它不能满足数据必须保留在本地和本地设施上的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service provided by AWS that allows users to run low-latency applications in specific geographical locations. While it can provide low latency, it does not meet the requirement that data must remain local and on local facilities.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该选项是 AWS 区域中的多个数据中心，用于实现高可用性和冗余。它们是 AWS 云的一部分，数据不会存储在本地设施上。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: These choices are multiple data centers in AWS Regions used for high availability and redundancy. They are part of the AWS cloud and the data is not kept on local facilities.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Outposts 是一种完全托管的解决方案，可让用户在本地设施中运行 AWS 服务，同时保持与 AWS 云的一致性。它满足数据必须保留在本地和本地设施上的要求，并提供低延迟。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This service is a fully managed solution that allows users to run AWS services in on-premises facilities while maintaining consistency with the AWS cloud. It meets the requirement that data must remain local and on local facilities and provides low latency.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该服务是针对5G网络优化的服务，旨在提供超低延迟，但它不符合「数据必须保留在本地且位于本地设施上」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This service is a service optimized for 5G networks and is designed to provide ultra-low latency, but it does not meet the requirement that "data must remain local and on local facilities".

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Outposts 是一种完全托管的解决方案，可让用户在本地设施中运行 AWS 服务，同时保持与 AWS 云的一致性。它满足数据必须保留在本地和本地设施上的要求，并提供低延迟。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is a fully managed solution that allows users to run AWS services in on-premises facilities while maintaining consistency with the AWS cloud. It meets the requirement that data must remain local and on local facilities and provides low latency.
